title: peucedanum japonicum var. latifolium
intro: Peucedanum japonicum var. latifolium, also known as Japanese ligusticum or Japanese angelica, is a plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae) that is native to East Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with Peucedanum japonicum var. latifolium include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestion. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
